name: Playwright Browser
summary: Drive a real browser -- navigate, click, fill, screenshot -- for testing + web automation.
description: Structured browser automation: open pages, interact via accessibility snapshots, screenshot, scrape. Lets agents verify a deployed site works, reproduce a bug visually, or pull data from sites without an API. Uses Microsoft's official Playwright MCP server (no vision model needed).

requires.label: Node + the ability to install Playwright browsers locally (downloads browser binaries)
